/opt/rocm-7.2.0/lib/llvm/bin/clang++  --offload-arch=gfx1151 --hip-link --rtlib=compiler-rt -unwindlib=libgcc -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/BeanTensorV4.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/BeanTensorV4.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BeanTensorV4.dir/Ops/Elementwise/Add/cpu_Add.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BeanTensorV4.dir/Tensor/Tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BeanTensorV4.dir/Tensor/TensorOps.hip.o -o BeanTensorV4  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxrt_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxrt_coreutil.so -luuid -ldl /opt/rocm/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.2.70200 /opt/rocm-7.2.0/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.2.70200 -lgcc -lgcc
